sentences.ko: 그래서 주머니에 Cisco 폰을 넣고 있었어요. 그리고 Cisco 폰으로도 좀 촬영했는데

sentences.en: so we lost some of that footage. Which explains why I keep on coming back and forth in post
sentences.ko: 그 영상도 잃어버렸어요. 그래서 편집에서 왔다 갔다 하는 거예요.

sentences.en: because I had to fill in the gaps. So after the ride, we were on my phone going through my footage,
sentences.ko: 빈 부분을 채워야 했거든요. 놀이기구 내린 후에 제 폰으로 영상을 확인하고 있었는데,

sentences.en: seeing how much we still have left. And speaking of footage, we got the exact moment where I lost his phone.
sentences.ko: 얼마나 남았는지 보고 있었어요. 영상 얘기가 나왔으니, 폰을 잃어버린 정확한 순간이 찍혔어요.

sentences.en: Did you catch it? Let me go frame by frame.
sentences.ko: 보셨어요? 프레임별로 다시 볼게요.

sentences.en: That alone was worth losing the phone.
sentences.ko: 그것만으로도 폰 잃어버린 값을 했어요.

sentences.en: You literally can't make this stuff up, guys.
sentences.ko: 이건 진짜 꾸며낼 수가 없어요, 여러분.

sentences.en: I had a hard feeling in my heart. I was like, this kid's gonna lose my phone.
sentences.ko: 마음이 찜찜했어요. 이 녀석이 내 폰 잃어버릴 것 같다고.

sentences.en: My heart sank. I'm just like, I took my pocket and I'm like, oh, where's this phone?
sentences.ko: 심장이 철렁했어요. 주머니를 만져보니까, 어, 폰이 어디 갔지?

sentences.en: Where's this phone? The phone is definitely destroyed, but if we get it back from Lost and Found,
sentences.ko: 폰 어디 갔어? 폰은 확실히 박살 났겠지만, 분실물 센터에서 찾으면

sentences.en: we can get the footage. Why was he so chill? I'm so confused.
sentences.ko: 영상은 건질 수 있어. 왜 이렇게 쿨한 거야? 이해가 안 돼.

sentences.en: The first thing I did tell him though was I'm gonna buy him a new phone.
sentences.ko: 제일 먼저 한 말은 새 폰 사줄게였어요.

sentences.en: And apparently he had all his stuff backed up on iCloud.
sentences.ko: 그리고 다행히 iCloud에 다 백업이 돼 있었대요.

sentences.en: So I guess we were just equally laughing at the footage. Shout out to Cisco though.
sentences.ko: 그래서 둘 다 영상 보면서 웃었어요. Cisco한테 박수.

sentences.en: That's a real one for not getting mad. Me and Lost and Found are trying to,
sentences.ko: 화 안 내다니 진짜다. 분실물 센터에서 찾으려고 하는데,

sentences.en: we got a nice lady right now. Is that what they look like when it comes to men?
sentences.ko: 지금 친절한 분이 도와주고 있어요. 남자한테는 저렇게 생긴 거야?

sentences.en: Once we filed the Lost and Found claim, we decided to head back to the car.
sentences.ko: 분실물 신고를 하고 나서, 차로 돌아가기로 했어요.

sentences.en: We're back in the car. There's only one phone in this car.
sentences.ko: 차에 돌아왔어요. 이 차에 폰이 하나밖에 없어.

sentences.en: Only one phone and it's not mine.
sentences.ko: 폰 하나인데 내 거도 아니야.

sentences.en: We then went to get him a new phone. We made it to the Best Buy.
sentences.ko: 그다음 새 폰을 사러 갔어요. Best Buy에 도착했어요.

sentences.en: This is a weird Best Buy at a mall. All right, so they don't have the iPhone 12 Pro Max that he had, right?
sentences.ko: 쇼핑몰에 있는 이상한 Best Buy야. 그가 가지고 있던 iPhone 12 Pro Max가 없대, 맞지?

sentences.en: Yeah. They have the 13 Pro Max, so we're just gonna get him that one. It's a good upgrade, right?
sentences.ko: 응. 13 Pro Max가 있어서 그걸로 사줄 거야. 좋은 업그레이드지?

sentences.en: However, getting the phone was harder than expected.
sentences.ko: 근데 폰 사는 게 생각보다 어려웠어요.

sentences.en: All right, so another plan two.
sentences.ko: 좋아, 플랜 B로 가자.

sentences.en: They had the phone directly with T-Mobile, which is what he has,
sentences.ko: T-Mobile 통해서 폰이 있었는데, 걔가 쓰는 통신사인데,

sentences.en: but he's not an authorized user to actually buy the phone.
sentences.ko: 근데 폰을 살 수 있는 인가된 사용자가 아니래.

sentences.en: And legally he can't take it.
sentences.ko: 법적으로 가져갈 수 없대요.

sentences.en: So we are going to Target, which is still open, thank God.
sentences.ko: 그래서 Target으로 가는데, 다행히 아직 영업 중이에요.

sentences.en: Target doesn't have unlocked iPhones.
sentences.ko: Target에는 언락 아이폰이 없대요.

sentences.en: It's great. All right, we'll just get your phone tomorrow then, right? Yeah.
sentences.ko: 좋겠다. 그러면 내일 폰 사자, 알겠지? 응.

sentences.en: So I don't know. What do we do, next day, transition?
sentences.ko: 그래서 모르겠다. 어떡하지, 다음 날, 전환?

sentences.en: No, I'm gonna do it. Okay, now it's the next day, and yeah, I got his phone.
sentences.ko: 아니, 내가 할게. 좋아, 다음 날이고, 네, 폰 샀어요.

sentences.en: Now I'm gonna go surprise him with it. My hair's still a mess. Your hair's still a mess?
sentences.ko: 이제 서프라이즈로 줄 거야. 머리 아직 엉망이야. 아직도 머리가 엉망이야?

sentences.en: I'm sorry. Here you go. Oh my gosh, Collin.
sentences.ko: 미안. 여기 있어. 세상에, Collin.

sentences.en: That was such a fake reaction. Let's do it again. Okay, next day, all right.
sentences.ko: 그거 완전 가짜 리액션이잖아. 다시 하자. 좋아, 다음 날, 알겠어.

sentences.en: Why do you look sad? Because that's the reaction. He's quiet. Oh!
sentences.ko: 왜 슬픈 표정이야? 그게 리액션이야. 조용하잖아. 오!

sentences.en: Shut up! Hey, there we go.
sentences.ko: 말도 안 돼! 자, 됐다.

sentences.en: Cling, cling, cling, cling, cling, cling. Follow the Instagram. Follow the Instagram.
sentences.ko: 짤랑, 짤랑, 짤랑, 짤랑, 짤랑, 짤랑. 인스타 팔로우. 인스타 팔로우.
